LAW AND MOTION 301,PLAINTIFF ELVIRA GONZALEZ'S MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE AND CLASS CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ELVIRA GONZALEZ'S MOTION FOR REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE AND CLASS CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO WHICH NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE CLASS CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.770.)COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE RULING OF THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (301/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2025 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-25-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Claims With Prejudice And Class Claims Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ELVIRA GONZALEZ's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Claims With Prejudice And Class Claims Without Prejudice.

Plaintiff Elvira Gonzalez's Motion for Request for Dismissal of Individual Claims With Prejudice and Class Claims Without Prejudice to which no opposition has been filed is GRANTED. Plaintiff's individual claims are dismissed with prejudice. The class claims are dismissed without prejudice. (See California Rules of Court, Rule 3.770.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the ruling of the court.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
